content.thinking:
The finding indicates that the source has 3 h2-level sections but the knowledge file only has 2. I need to split the current s2 into two sections:
- s2: トランザクション名 (the transaction name usage)
- s3: 実装コードで見るトランザクション制御 (the JdbcTransaction implementation code example)

Looking at the source:
1. データベースコネクション名 (h2) → s1 ✓
2. トランザクション名 (h2) → s2 (but currently includes content from s3)
3. 実装コードで見るトランザクション制御 (h2 in the source - noted as `----` adornment) → needs to be s3


I'm clarifying the RST heading structure: the `====` over-and-under marks the title, the first `----` creates h2 headings, and the first `====` underline-only creates h3 headings. All three sections—データベースコネクション名, トランザクション名, and 実装コードで見るトランザクション制御—use the `----` adornment, confirming they're all h2-level headings that need to be properly separated in the knowledge file. I'm working through the RST heading hierarchy more carefully now. The document uses different underline characters to establish levels: the overline-and-underline pattern marks the title, then subsequent single underlines determine heading levels based on first occurrence. So `----` appears three times for what should be h2 headings, and `===` appears multiple times for h3 headings, which means I need to figure out the actual nesting structure from context rather than just the adornment characters alone. I see the issue now - I need to move the implementation code example showing the 1対1対応 relationship into its own section under s3. The current s2 should contain just the description and usage examples for transaction names, while s3 will hold the actual code demonstrating how transaction names and database connections map to each other in practice. トランザクション名はスレッド内でユニークである必要があり、JdbcTransaction使用時にはトランザクション名とデータベースコネクション名が1対1で対応する。使用例として、トランザクションの登録と名前の設定方法を示すコード例を含める。
